basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate – II Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, for OBC is 3 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years OBC: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Food Science and Nutrition/Life Sciences with 2 years of experience in Research and Development.
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Food Science and Nutrition/Life Sciences from a recognized University or equivalent. 2 years of experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science & Technology Organisations and Scientific activities and Services.

salary_details.details: Project Associate - II (PAT-II): Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate – II position at CSIR CFTRI is 24th May 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate – II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Food Science and Nutrition, or Life Sciences from a recognized university. Additionally, 2 years of relevant research experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate – II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate – II post is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates can avail a relaxation of 5 years, while OBC candidates can get a relaxation of 3 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate – II position will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate – II position in this recruitment drive by CSIR CFTRI.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – II recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate – II position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial shortlisting of candidates by a designated committee, followed by an interview for the shortlisted applicants.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or temporary job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate – II position at CSIR CFTRI is a temporary contractual role, offered for a specific project duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official CSIR CFTRI website for more details.
